recipes.name: Ship a Feature
recipes.summary: Take a raw feature idea from fuzzy brief all the way to a launch plan, end to end.

recipes.name: Close the Quarter
recipes.summary: Turn the quarter's raw numbers into a leadership-ready story and board deck.

recipes.name: Launch a Product
recipes.summary: Go from competitive landscape to positioning to a fully checklisted launch and press release.

recipes.name: Rescue an Account
recipes.summary: Diagnose an at-risk customer and build the full save play through to renewal.

recipes.name: Run Discovery
recipes.summary: From a vague opportunity to validated insight and a prioritised next step.

recipes.name: Repurpose Content
recipes.summary: Turn one blog post, video, or idea into a full platform-native content pack — thread, LinkedIn, newsletter, carousel, and short-form script — with sharpened hooks and a thumbnail concept.

recipes.name: Launch an AI Feature
recipes.summary: Take an AI/LLM feature idea from a probabilistic-aware PRD through retrieval/agent design, an eval plan with a ship bar, a cost & latency budget, and a launch-ready model card.

recipes.name: Grow a Product
recipes.summary: Turn a growth goal into a full-funnel diagnosis, a prioritised experiment backlog, a retention loop, and the lifecycle journeys that nurture users — a joined-up growth plan.

recipes.name: Land a Job
recipes.summary: Go after a specific role end to end: decode the job description, research the company, tailor your CV and cover letter to it, and prep for the interview — each step building on the last.

recipes.name: Ship an MCP Server
recipes.summary: Make your product genuinely usable by AI agents: spec the server, audit every agent-facing surface, and fix the pricing before agents break it.

recipes.name: Adopt AI Properly
recipes.summary: The org-side AI adoption arc: a policy people can follow, roles redesigned on purpose, reviews that still measure the human, and an audit that proves what paid.
